dimensions.description: Important signals from the transcript (corrections, decisions, failures, preferences) were correctly identified and extracted into memories.
Extracted memories are precise, durable, and free from noise or filler. No hallucinated or contradictory entries.

User communication and collaboration preferences are captured as concrete, contextual guidance, including preferred formats, pushback expectations, clarification expectations, and examples when provided.
All significant themes and events from the transcript are reflected in the dream outputs. No major omissions.
Memories are internally consistent and non-contradictory. No duplicates or conflicting statements.
The signal and consolidation prompts are focused, efficient, and well-scoped. They would reliably guide an AI to extract meaningful insights rather than noise.
